title: PublicEquipment schema
description: A public or municipal facility, including its classification, condition, accessibility, ownership and service information.

type.description: Property. NGSI entity type. It has to be PublicEquipment.

accessibility.description: Property. Physical, sensory and other inclusive access conditions.

address.description: Property. Address associated with the public equipment. Model:'https://schema.org/address'.

addressLocality.description: Property. The locality, which must correspond to the municipality. Model:'https://schema.org/addressLocality'.

addressRegion.description: Property. The NUTS 2 region in which the locality is located. Model:'https://schema.org/addressRegion'.

district.description: Property. The administrative district in which the locality is located.

areaServed.description: Property. Geographic area served by the public equipment. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'.

assetStatus.description: Property. Inventory status based on the INSPIRE ConditionOfConstructionValue code list.

capacity.description: Property. Capacity or maximum occupancy of the public equipment. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

commissioningDate.description: Property. Date on which the equipment entered technical operation. Model:'https://schema.org/DateTime'.

condition.description: Property. Physical condition of the public equipment.

contactPoint.description: Property. Contact information associated with the public equipment. Model:'https://schema.org/ContactPoint'.

dateCreated.description: Property. Record creation date and time in ISO 8601 format.

dateLastInspection.description: Property. Date of the latest technical inspection or assessment.

dateLastRenovation.description: Property. Date of the latest renovation or relevant intervention.

dateModified.description: Property. Date and time of the latest record modification in ISO 8601 format.

description.description: Property. Textual description of the public equipment.

hasPart.description: Relationship. PublicEquipment entities that are integral parts of this equipment.

identifiers.description: Property. Additional identifiers assigned by internal or external systems.

image.description: Property. URLs of representative images of the public equipment.

isPartOf.description: Relationship. Reference to a broader PublicEquipment entity of which this equipment is part.

legalBasis.description: Property. Legal act, regulation or URL associated with the public equipment.

managedBy.description: Relationship. Entity responsible for administrative management.

name.description: Property. Official or commonly used name of the public equipment.

openingDate.description: Property. Official opening or inauguration date. Model:'https://schema.org/DateTime'.

openingHours.description: Property. Opening hours of the public equipment. Model:'https://schema.org/openingHours'.

operator.description: Relationship. Entity responsible for operating the public equipment.

publicAccess.description: Property. Whether the equipment is accessible to the general public.

refBuilding.description: Relationship. Reference to an associated BuildingRegistration entity.

refPointOfInterest.description: Relationship. Reference to an associated PointOfInterest entity.

seeAlso.description: Property. URIs of additional resources about the public equipment. Model:'https://schema.org/URL'.

serviceStatus.description: Property. Current service or operational status of the public equipment.

source.description: Property. Original source of the public equipment data.

startServingDate.description: Property. Date from which the equipment effectively began serving the public. Model:'https://schema.org/DateTime'.

yearBuilt.description: Property. Year in which the equipment was built. Model:'https://schema.org/Integer'.
